summary: Demote checkBranchHasTodoCommit to advisory; let --commit <sha> satisfy it, keep done-contract hard
description: checkBranchHasTodoCommit (src/branch-guard.ts) greps commit messages for todo:<id> and hard-fails on a false negative when the deliverable rides a differently-prefixed commit. Let close --commit <sha> satisfy the guard, or downgrade the grep to a warning. Keep the real done-contract hard (commit-exists + test/note in src/state.ts). Files: src/branch-guard.ts, src/commands/close.ts.
